title: Origins: Genders
description: This mod adds compatibility between "Create: Estrogen" and "Origins"
body:
Adds a new selection screen to the origins mod that lets you select your gender it uses the attributes added by "create: estrogen" to give the player model a chest



<details>
<summary>Questions</summary>

### Do i need to get this on both a server and client?
no you do not, this runs entirely on the server. **but** neither origins or estrogen are server sided and are needed on both

</details>


<details>
<summary>Modpacks/Redistribution</summary>

Feel free to use in any modpacks as long as it stays on the modrinth network

Please **DO NOT** redistribute modified or unmodified versions of this (this does not include versions modified to better fit a modpack as long as that veraion stays in your modpack and stays on modrinth)


</details>
